sections.title: Starting off
If the player hasn't cleared the Theatre before

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Any luck in the Theatre?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to be doing again?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Enter the Theatre and beat the challenges within. Doing so would cause great embarrasment to Verzik, and my associates would very much appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's all this really about?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you don't really expect me to believe you're just here to embarrass Verzik do you? What's really going on?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: My associates prefer to keep their intentions to themselves. However, if you were to assist us with another matter, I might be able to share more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Your suspicions are correct. My role here is not to embarrass Verzik Vitur. Instead, my associates have a long history with Verzik, and have sent me here to keep an eye on her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're spying on her? Then why are you asking people to go and 'embarrass' her?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Research?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes. As you're aware, of all those that go into the Theatre, the vast majority never come out. That said, some have managed to succeed. Of course, the vampyres would never let the citizens know this.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Thanks to these successes, I've been able to gather information on Verzik and her abilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, so they're the ones that have been doing the spying. Still, that doesn't explain what this is all for.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Verzik has abilities unlike any other vampyre. However, she did not always possess these abilities. My associates are keen to discover how she obtained them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean that thing she does where she turns into a spider?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I think I understand now. So where do I come in?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: These were recently recovered from within the Theatre. Take a look at them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eggs?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Not just any eggs. These are the eggs of a nylocas, one of Verzik's arachnid pets.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Normally this wouldn't be anything special. After all, Verzik has hundreds of nylocas. However, these eggs are from a variant we've never encountered before.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: What's more interesting than that though is how they were obtained. For lack of a better description, the mercenary who recovered them claimed they 'fell out' of Verzik herself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Verzik laid some eggs?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Apparently so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How lovely. I think you've safely put me off my food for the rest of today. So you think these eggs are somehow connected to her unique abilities?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It would line up with some suspicions my associates have had for a while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And I suppose you want me to look into this?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not to mention the whole turning into a spider thing I guess. I suppose you want me to look into this?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: That is correct. I also believe you have a friend who can help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a friend?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: A dead one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, that sounds about right. Which dead friend are we talking about here?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Ranis Drakan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... And how's a dead vampyre going to help us exactly?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: My kind have the ability to relive our memories as if they are happening again. We can also relive the memories of others if we are able to make physical contact with them. I could show you if you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please don't go poking through my memories. Also, what do you mean by 'your kind'?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I am not at liberty to say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course. How silly of me. And you want to relive Ranis' memories I'm guessing? Will that even work now that he's dead?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We are lucky that vampyre corpses deteriorate slower than many other species. Enough of his brain should still be intact for me to work with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... Nice. What's he got to do with these eggs though?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Ranis and Verzik were close friends. He interacted with her more than anyone else did. Getting close enough to Verzik to observe her own memories will be... problematic. He is the next best option.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Within his memories we can hopefully learn more about Verzik and her abilities. As for the eggs, they are our catalyst.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It would take years to search through all of Ranis' mind, but I can use these eggs to help us find relevant memories much faster.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Now, I must remain here. That means you will need to recover Ranis for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And where can I find him?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Luckily for us, Ranis always loved the Theatre. As such, he is actually buried deep below it. You can use the staircase to the north east to access his crypt.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Be careful, it's well guarded. Even other vampyres are not allowed in. I suggest you take that flail of yours.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Also, you don't need to bring his whole body back of course. That wouldn't be very subtle. We only need his brain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Brains are generally attached to the body you know.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I know. That's why I'd recommend you take a saw.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Oh god.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm not that interested.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish. Return to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Return to me when that changes.

sections.title: If the player has cleared the Theatre at least once

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've managed to defeat Verzik!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! After beating all of her challenges, she chose to face me herself. I couldn't fully defeat her though. She just transformed into a bat and flew away.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very impressive. I had a feeling you would have what it takes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what now?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Verzik will be back soon enough. Death will not come easy for her. However, you have still been of great use to my associates.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Speaking of your associates, what's all this really about?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you don't really expect me to believe you're just here to embarrass Verzik do you? What's really going on?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: My associates prefer to keep their intentions to themselves. However, if you were to assist us with another matter, I might be able to share more.

sections.title: Talking to the Mysterious Stranger again after initially declining the quest

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. Interested in heading back into the Theatre?

sections.title: Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this thing you need from me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Your suspicions are correct. My role here is not to embarrass Verzik Vitur. Instead, my associates have a long history with Verzik, and have sent me here to keep an eye on her.

sections.title: Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after they show you the eggs

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this thing you need from me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: These were recently recovered from within the Theatre. Take a look at them.

sections.title: Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after being told to get Ranis' head

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find Ranis?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You can use the staircase to the north east to access his crypt. Remember, you don't need to bring his whole body back. We only need his brain. I'd recommend you take a saw.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I want to be sick.

sections.title: Entering Ranis' crypt
Attempting to open the gate without a key
Obtaining Ranis' head

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well this is probably one of the more disgusting things I've ever done. Here goes nothing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there Ranis. Didn't expect to see you again. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I think I might be at my lowest point in life right now. I really need to find a hobby or something.

sections.title: Searching coffin with full inventory
Searching coffin while already holding the head
Getting the head again
Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after getting Ranis' head
After giving the Mysterious Stranger Ranis' head

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what are we doing with Ranis' head?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It seems that Ranis has many memories of these eggs, or at least of something very similar. Thanks to my abilities, we can view these memories. Hopefully they will reveal the truth about Verzik.

sections.title: After finishing the first memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So about that memory...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: What about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was Verzik?

sections.title: After being told to explore the nest

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find that nest?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It's supposedly just north of Darkmeyer. Go there and see if you can find any eggs matching the ones Ranis gave to Verzik.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright. I'll be back once I've explored this nest.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to recover Ranis' head.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Good work. Hand it over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... I seem to have lost it.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You should probably go and find it again then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Hmm... Yes, I think this will work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what now?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It seems that Ranis has many memories of these eggs, or at least of something very similar. Thanks to my abilities, we can view these memories. Hopefully they will reveal the truth about Verzik.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Now, I suggest we start at the beginning. Take my hand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you making this weird?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I require physical contact to share the memory with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Do you have them?

lines.speaker: Vyrewatch
lines.text: Right here, my lord.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Excellent. I will take them from here.

lines.speaker: Vyrewatch
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Ranis my dear, how wonderful to see you.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: And you Verzik.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I see you've wasted no time in introducing our new guest to the Theatre.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I must say, I find the name you've given her to be quite interesting. Not the kind of thing I'd have expected from you.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Well I thought it would be quite humorous.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I see. So you intend to use her as a new challenge?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: It seemed an ironically fitting role for her, given that fun little narrative you came up with. Besides, with all the work you put in, it would have felt wrong to just abandon her.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: You should not have worried about that. The things we learnt from her down in the labs more than made up for the effort.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Well either way, I'm glad she's here. I've found her to be quite the inspiration. Thanks to her, I've decided to give the whole place a bit of a sprucing up.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: You're replacing all the challenges?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Absolutely! Those old ones were getting dull. It's time for some fresh excitement in this place.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Well perhaps I have something that can help with that. I have a gift for you.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: A gift? Oh Ranis you do spoil me!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: You can thank Lowerniel for this one. He found these eggs in an arachnid nest north of Darkmeyer. He thought you might be able to use them in your nylocas breeding program.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: How exciting! Do pass on my thanks. He is always welcome to come and pay me a visit himself, of course.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: The Theatre has never really been his thing.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Oh Ranis, I do love your brother, but he is such a bore! He needs to learn to live a little!

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Anyway, tell me more about this nest.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: The arachnids there are highly unique. Lowerniel thinks their queen might be of a higher power.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: A higher power? He doesn't think that silly stone he used to have is involved, does he?

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: No, he suspects something more natural.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Really? Well either way, if he's right, these eggs could be key to some very exciting new nylocas.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I look forward to seeing the results.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: As do I...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Interesting... Very interesting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was Verzik?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It was. However, the memory was from many years ago, before she gained her unique abilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what's our next step?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The eggs in that memory were very similar to the ones in my possession, but they were not identical. It sounded like Verzik intended to use them to breed new nylocas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps that breeding is what led to the eggs you have.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: And perhaps it was also the starting point for Verzik's abilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can we be sure?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We will need to recover some of those eggs for ourselves. With them, we may be able to find further relevant memories.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ranis said they came from a nest north of Darkmeyer. I'll see if I can find it.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Good idea. I will remain here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any reason why you're not able to join me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, let me guess. Your associates...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: My associates would prefer I remain here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure why I asked. I'll be back once I've explored this nest.

sections.title: The strange spider eggs
Attempting to open the egg sac
Searching the skeleton
Talking to Daer Krand
Talking to Daer Krand again before getting the sulphuric acid

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well met!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any sulphuric acid?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Yes, here you go.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Come back when you have some room for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

sections.title: Talking to Daer Krand again after getting the sulphuric acid

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well met!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any sulphuric acid?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Looks like you already have some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... So I do. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Did I not already give you some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Oh... Well I suppose I can spare some.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Come back when you have some room for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well met!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any sulphuric acid?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: What? What for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I was exploring a cave west of here and I think I found your assistant.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: I was wondering where she got to. Where is she now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah yes... About that...

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... she's dead I'm afraid. Looks like the spiders in the cave killed her. Ate most of her as well...

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: What a disaster! It's going to take forever to find a new willing assistant who's competent as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... Oddly enough I can't imagine many people will be queueing up to go get themselves eaten by spiders for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Still, if it helps, it looks like she did find what she was after. There's an egg sac near where I found her. If I had some sulphuric acid, I could melt through it.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well I suppose I can give you some. Consider it a thank you for bringing me the news about my assistant.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Come back when you have some room for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! Want me to bring you some of those eggs?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: No, it's fine. I'll send my new assistant to get me some... Once I find a new assistant anyway.

sections.title: Opening the egg sac while holding the acid
Taking the egg sac again after losing the eggs
Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after getting the eggs
After giving the Mysterious Stranger the eggs

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So we have the eggs. Now what?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I believe I can use these new eggs to help us find more memories of note. Hopefully they will start to present a clearer picture for us.

sections.title: After the second memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That memory didn't tell us too much.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It seems Verzik did manage to use those eggs to create new nylocas. However, something is still missing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there another memory that could tell us more?

sections.title: After the third memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That memory seemed more useful.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Indeed. It seems a hespori is key to our next steps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've grown a hespori before!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a hespori?

sections.title: After being told to retrieve Hespori bark

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find a hespori?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I'm not sure. They are native to Morytania, but they are quite rare. You mentioned a nature spirit who could help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right! He lives in the swamp.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Then you should go and speak to him. I will await your return.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found some of those eggs.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Excellent. Let's have a look at them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't actually have them with me.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Well I'll need you to bring them here. They could be key to understanding Verzik's abilities.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Hmm... How curious...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I believe I can use these new eggs to help us find more memories of note. Hopefully they will start to present a clearer picture for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that would be nice. I'm still a bit lost to be honest... Then again, I guess that's just the norm for me.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Once we're done, I'll also have the eggs sent to my associates. Assuming they do have a connection to Verzik's abilities, they will come in very useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your associates aren't trying to replicate her powers are they?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Oh quite the opposite. Their hope is to find a way to counteract them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Anyway, I think I have found a new memory for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's take a look.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Bloat? Not the most elaborate of names, is it?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: A crude name for a crude creation.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Well it's most definitely crude... Quite disgusting as well.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Turns your stomach, does it Ranis? I'm surprised you'd find anything disgusting after what you did to that girl.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I just think it's important to take a bit of pride in your work. This is a Theatre, Verzik. We should be producing art!

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Ranis darling, I couldn't agree more. Come have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: A new nylocas?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: The athanatos! Isn't it magnificent!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: It's quite a sight to behold.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: I have you and Lowerniel to thank for this one. This is the result of those eggs you gave me.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: I'm glad you were able to make good use of them.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Oh I've been able to work wonders with them, and I'm not done yet. If all goes well, the athanatos will be just the beginning...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: So Verzik did manage to use those eggs to create new nylocas. However, something is still missing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there another memory that could tell us more?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes, I believe there is. Let us see what it can tell us.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: My my... You've really outdone yourself this time.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Ranis you flatterer!

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: So was this one also the result of those eggs?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Much more boring I'm afraid. I still have plans for those eggs, but I'm missing a key aspect right now. Don't worry, I'm sure I'll get it worked out.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Perhaps I can help. What are you missing?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Oh Ranis, you're not trying to steal my thunder are you?

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Verzik, you know I wouldn't...

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Just joking Ranis! I know you're far too noble for that.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: The thing I need is something with the ability to regenerate. Nylocas are strong in numbers, but far too weak on their own.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Hmm... I think I know just the thing. When we created the Maiden, we experimented heavily in that area.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Ah, of course. You and your haemalchemy.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Well in the end it wasn't actually haemalchemy that gave us the answer. It came in the form of a gift from the old queen.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Not another of her plants was it?

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Precisely that! Specifically the hespori. Their bark has wonderful regenerative abilities.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: I see... Yes, I think that might just work. Thank you, Ranis.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Hespori... Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've grown a hespori before!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a hespori?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: They are remarkable plants with a will of their own. Not to mention their many unique properties...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: They were grown here back when this place was still known as Hallowvale. The Saradominist Queen of the region used them as weapons against the vampyres.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know your history.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: More than most.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It sounds like the vampyres found multiple uses for the hespori. Not only did they play a part in the creation of the Maiden of Sugadinti, but they were also potentially used to make a new nylocas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm guessing this is the bit where I retrieve some hespori bark for us.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You are correct. However, I'd suggest you collect some from a naturally occuring hespori rather than one you've grown yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I can find one?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: They are native to Morytania, but they are quite rare. I'm afraid I'm not an expert on nature.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... I know of a nature spirit who lives in the swamp. He can probably help.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Perfect. I will await your return.

sections.title: The hespori bark
Talking to the Nature Spirit

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Welcome back, my friend. I sense that you need my help with something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right! I'm looking for a hespori. I was hoping you might know where one is.

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Ah, a hespori. They're wonderful plants. Why are you looking for one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... Just some research...

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Research? What are you researching?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just... plants... and stuff...

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: I see... Well do be very careful. Hespori are rare enough as it is without people damaging them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... I'm definitely not going to damage it in any way.

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Wonderful! Now, let me see...

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Yes! I can sense the presence of a hespori near here. It's to the north east, on a small island in the swamp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help.

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: For you my friend, it is no problem at all.

sections.title: Talking to the Nature Spirit again

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: Welcome back, my friend. Did you find that hespori?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me where it is?

lines.speaker: Nature Spirit
lines.text: I can sense it to the north east, on a small island in the swamp.

sections.title: Chopping the Hespori
Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after killing the Hespori
After giving the Mysterious Stranger the bark

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we use this bark to find more memories?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes, I think so. Let me see what I can find...

sections.title: After the fourth memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more memories for us to look at?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: There is one final memory. Let us hope it provides the answers we seek.

sections.title: After the fifth memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This Verzik business kind of feels like it's been a waste of time.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Verzik made a new nylocas, it bit her and it just died. That was it.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We have still gained a lot here. That bite almost certainly led to her abilities, and we know how the nylocas variant responsible was created.

sections.title: After being told to complete the Theatre of Blood

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ready to enter the Theatre?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I am. Remember, you need to get me all the way to Verzik herself and then defeat her. When she is at her weakest, I should be able able to extract the memories we need.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Don't forget you can use the notice board to find suitable allies to join us if you don't feel comfortable doing this alone. I will join you inside once you are ready.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a hespori.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Perfect. Do you have some bark from it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Then you should go and recover some. Be careful, for it will likely fight back. I will await your return.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Excellent. This is just what we needed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can it help us find more memories?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes, I think so. Let me see what I can find...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Ah, here we go. I believe we're getting close now.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Power over the Shadow Realm you say? That takes me back to the old empire.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: That was the inspiration. Alas, the experiments didn't really go anywhere in the end.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Such a pity. Still, he will make for a fine new challenge here. As always Ranis, you are far too generous.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Speaking of experiments, did you think any more on my hespori suggestion for that new nylocas?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: That I did. It's going very well so far. Still too early to be sure, but I think this could be the one.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: The one?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Absolutely! The nylocas to end all nylocas.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: That's quite the ambition. So when do we get to see the results?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Patience now Ranis. You can't rush perfection. It won't be long now, I'm sure of it...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Interesting, but not overly illuminating. Still, we are not far off now.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: There is one final memory. Let us hope it provides the answers we seek.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright. Let's take a look.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: The last King of the yarasa... I never thought I'd see one of their kind again.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Does this mean Lowerniel finally found a way home?

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: It would seem so, but he did not enlighten me on how he did it.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Fascinating...

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Anyway, I have something you simply have to see. Come take a look.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Is this...?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: This is the one Ranis. This is my new Queen Nylocas. All that work has finally paid off.

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: It's very small.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Oh don't worry darling, it will grow. I'll have to come up with a fancy name as well.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Ouch! You little...

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Ranis Drakan
lines.text: Not what you were expecting?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: I really thought this was the one...

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Back to square one I guess. What a waste.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was it? She made a new nylocas, it bit her and it just died?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We have still gained a lot here. That bite almost certainly led to her abilities, and we know how the nylocas variant responsible was created.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We even have the relevant materials as well. Between them and the knowledge we now have, my associates should be able to begin work on new weapons and techniques to use against Verzik.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But who knows what may have happened after that bite... What if we're missing some key information?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I admit, while hopefully not essential, clarity on what happened next would be very useful. However, Ranis has no further memories of use to us. There's likely to only be one place to find the truth now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean Verzik herself?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Correct. But for me to gain access to Verzik's memories, I'd need to make physical contact with her. That would require us to enter the Theatre, something I was quite keen to avoid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've made it through the Theatre before. I could do it again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've never made it through the Theatre before, but I'm sure I can manage it.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: True, but I am no fighter. However...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I know that there have been times when groups have entered the Theatre and had members not actually participate in the challenges.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Provided the more able members of the group succeed, these individuals are still considered to have beaten the challenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you want me to 'carry' you through the Theatre?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: That is an apt way of putting it. If you can get me to Verzik, I should hopefully be able to extract the memories we need. The moment of defeat will be my best opportunity, when she is weakest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I think we can make this work.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You can still take other people in as well of course. Just use the notice board to set up a party and find suitable allies. Once you're ready, I will join you in the Theatre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In that case, I'll see you in there.

sections.title: A Night at the Theatre
After each wave

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You fought well. Now, let us move on. We have to reach Verzik so that I can extract her memories.

sections.title: The Maiden of Sugadinti

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Maiden of Sugadinti. Such an ironic name.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you know about her?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Not much more than you probably know yourself. Hers is a tragic tale of misguided hope.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You might find it useful to know that she's a powerful user of magic. Unsurprisingly, blood magic is her specialism. I hear she also has a habit of using nylocas to further increase her power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good to know. Thanks.

sections.title: Pestilent Bloat

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Pestilent Bloat. What a disgusting monstrosity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What even is it?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Nothing fancier than some crude necromancy. Still, that doesn't mean it's not dangerous. Don't even try to take it head on. Wait for the perfect moment and attack while it is weak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

sections.title: Nylocas

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Nylocas... I've always hated nylocas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've encountered nylocas before?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Some types. Alone they're not overly dangerous, but you'll never encounter them alone. Their power is in numbers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do I overcome that?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Different variants have different weaknesses. Prioritise your targets, and ensure you use the right weaponry against them.

sections.title: Sotetseg

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Sotetseg. One of the greater mysteries of this Theatre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: He's some sort of modified dark beast. No dark beasts have ever been encountered in Morytania, so who knows how the vampyres got him here. Perhaps he is not of this world at all...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Be careful, for he has a strong affinity with the shadow realm. He will almost certainly use it against you. Expect the unexpected.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Unexpected?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes. Survivors of the Theatre have spoken of some sort of strange shadowy maze.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

sections.title: Xarpus

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The once great King of the yarasa. This prison is such a sad end for Xarpus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You feel sorry for him?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Death would be preferable to a life of imprisonment. The Theatre is a testament to that.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Anyway, we are close now. Defeat Xarpus, and the path to Verzik is clear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any advice?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: He will attempt to power himself up before he fights. Try and stop that where you can. Once the fight begins, be careful of his highly poisonous attacks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay thanks.

sections.title: Verzik Vitur

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You fought well. Now, only Verzik awaits. Remember, you must fully defeat her for me to have a chance to extract her memories. Let us proceed once you are ready.

sections.title: The final memory
Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after completing the Theatre of Blood

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you manage to get any useful memories from Verzik?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes and no. I have a memory that I believe has answers for us. However, it is not Verzik's memory.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I think it's best if I just show you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Doctor... are you still there?

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: I'm right here, my lady. I was just finishing my notes.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: I feel... I feel... wrong.

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: My lady, as I've already said, we really should take you to my surgery in Darkmeyer. Whatever that nylocas did, it was no normal bite.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: No! This is my home! You will not take me!

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: I understand. My notes are finished now. I will leave you in peace.

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Peace? Yes...

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: Doctor... It's... inside me!

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: My lady?

lines.speaker: Verzik Vitur
lines.text: I can feel it! Help me!

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: What...

lines.speaker: Nylocas Queen
lines.text: Come... Come my pretties...

lines.speaker: Nylocas Queen
lines.text: Destroy the witness... Let us dine on his corpse!

lines.speaker: Vulcan Orvoros
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Nylocas Queen
lines.text: The rule of the vampyres is over... The rule of the nylocas has begun...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Verzik... She died!

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We feared the worst, but we never anticipated something like this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But does this mean... the Verzik in the Theatre...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: ...is really just that nylocas in disguise. We must inform my master at once.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your master? So these associates you've been going on about... they don't actually exist do they?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: They do not. My master preferred that I keep his involvement a secret, but I feel you are now trusted enough to meet him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Meet him? Where?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: In a similar way to how my kind can relive our memories, we can also communicate across great distances.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Another of my kind is with my master. Through the two of us, you will be able to speak with him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I think I understand.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well this is weird.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: It can take some getting used to. Now, I will contact my master and inform him of what we have discovered. Once I am done, I expect he will want to speak with you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: There. Now, when I next speak, it will be my voice you hear. However, the words are from my master.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: Greetings my child. It is good that we are finally able to speak, for you have done a great service to me and my disciples.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It would be nicer if we could speak in person.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: If that were possible, we would make it so. There are many constraints upon us. Still, these constraints are often to our benefit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: We share many common enemies, you and I. Enemies that infest Hallowvale like a disease.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: By remaining far away from this disease, I keep us all safer. Instead, my disciples act as my eyes, ears, and hands upon Gielinor. They are the harbingers of my will.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where are you then?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: Home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... And what's your connection to Verzik?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: She was an old foe. We will not weep for her demise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about this nylocas that's replaced her?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: A concerning development. However, you have gathered all that we need to overcome it when the time is right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When the time is right?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: When the time is right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So there's nothing further for us to do now?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Master
lines.text: No. For now, we must wait. But once again, you have my thanks. My disciple will ensure you are suitably rewarded. Know that you are now a friend of Sugadinti.

sections.title: Talking to the Mysterious Stranger after finishing the first memory cutscene

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Verzik... She died!

sections.title: Claiming quest rewards with inventory space

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. My master is very impressed with your work. On his behalf, allow me to reward you.
